prompt: Edit image 1: Render the bacteria with the stark, high-contrast silhouette style seen in image 2, and apply the vibrant greenish-blue color scheme and detailed texture from image 3 to the resulting microscopic scene.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Transform the bacteria into the stark, high-contrast, white-on-black silhouette style of image 2. Then, apply the vibrant greenish-blue color scheme and the intricate, porous texture from image 3 to these silhouetted bacteria and the surrounding microscopic scene.
